acceptance_results.criterion: postback-dispatcher compose env includes DB_POSTGRESQL_* names consumed by common/config.
Targeted postback-dispatcher smoke connects to DB and starts dispatcher.
No source, dependency, vendor, package, frontend, credential, or schema files changed.

blockers: Postback dispatcher polling logs missing postback_outbox after startup because the compose DB has not applied postback migrations.
Notification worker dispatcher logs missing message_outbox after startup because the compose DB has not applied message cadence migrations.
Acquisition API still exits during admin schema bootstrap because products/userbase base tables are missing in the empty compose DB.
cleanup_notes: Targeted compose project was stopped with docker compose down -v --remove-orphans.
Temporary shared-network was removed when this smoke created it.
Temporary Docker auth files were removed by shell trap.
completed_work: Added DB_POSTGRESQL_* aliases and sslmode env to postback-dispatcher compose service.
Ran targeted postback-dispatcher compose smoke; dispatcher remained running, connected to DB, and started polling.
Recorded downstream missing postback_outbox schema as a separate blocker.
known_gaps: postback_outbox schema provisioning is still required for successful dispatcher polling.
message_outbox and acquisition base schema provisioning remain.
Provider delivery/live-flow verification still requires real env/provider values.
operator_message: TMP-032 fixed postback-dispatcher compose DB env and startup. Dispatcher now connects to DB and starts; the remaining postback blocker is missing postback_outbox schema provisioning.
risk_notes: No postback source, common source, dependency, vendor, package, frontend, credential, or schema files were changed.
Missing postback_outbox is a schema provisioning issue and was not changed in this compose-only slice.
summary: Postback dispatcher compose DB env fixed and startup verified.
